name: Peanut Butter'n Chocolate Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Line a 10 x 15 inch jelly roll pan with foil and grease well. Cut cookie dough into 4 lengthwise pieces and place on the foil lined pan. Press with the heel of your hand to evenly spread over the bottom of the pan, forming a crust. Smooth with a table knife. Bake for 8 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, prepare the filling. In a large bowl, beat together cream cheese, sugar, and peanut butter with an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy, about 2 to 3 minutes. Add eggs and heavy cream and beat on high for 4 minutes.
3. Spread the filling evenly over the baked crust. Bake for 22 to 27 minutes, or until just set. Cool to room temperature, then refrigerate until chilled. To serve, cut into 50 squares; carefully remove foil from the bottom of the squares.
